creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, this configuration involves built-in irdma:
include GENERIC

ident VALIDATION

options MROUTING
options DDB
options KDB
options KDB_UNATTENDED
options KDB_TRACE

# iWARP support
options OFED
options OFED_DEBUG_INIT
options COMPAT_LINUXKPI
options SDP
options IPOIB_CM

device netmap

nodevice ixl

device ice
device ice_ddp
device irdma
